body:
Elena,

You closed your Series B funding in February and currently have 11 open roles, including three Python-related engineering positions. Companies in this stage often find recruiting capacity to be a bigger challenge than budget.

Tenacious runs dedicated engineering squads for companies scaling post-Series B, with senior engineers available in about a week, embedded in your stack and overlapping with Pacific time.

Would you be open to a 30-minute discovery call next Tuesday or Wednesday to explore if this could fit your current needs? 10 [Cal link]

Elena
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
subject: Context: your $14M Series B and the Python team
